episodes.title: Devotion: Obedience or Betrayal | Official Trailer | Paramount+
episodes.description:
They say it’s faith. Others call it a cult.

With rare access inside Gloriavale, Devotion: Obedience or Betrayal reveals a closed religious community facing allegations of abuse and cover-ups.

Stream the new Paramount+ Original documentary June 2, exclusively on Paramount+.
